title: La'okio
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''La'okio''' was a village on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], founded by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Despite the Yuuzhan Vong's intentions to move beyond their caste system
progress was rather slow despite the attempts by [[Bava]] to make it functional.

{{City-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
